summary: Project Map Feature Testing - All tests passed. Backend: 5/5 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Map card, markers, popups, and GPS badges all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Map feature implementation is clean and follows React best practices
Leaflet integration with CDN icons is correctly configured
GPS badge styling uses appropriate green color scheme for visibility
Map only renders when at least 1 project has GPS (graceful handling)
Popup content shows all required fields: name, location, client, coordinates
seed_data_creation: None - used existing projects with GPS coordinates
context_for_next_testing_agent: Project Map feature fully tested and working. SE dashboard Projects tab shows a Leaflet map with markers for projects that have GPS coordinates. 3 of 5 SE projects have GPS: Vinoth Kumar Villa (13.0500, 80.2500), RE - Vinoth (T Nagar), RE - Vinoth Kumar (Adyar). Map card has data-testid='project-map-card'. GPS badges appear as green 'GPS' text next to location on project cards.

verified_features.PATCH /api/projects/{id}/set-location: Sets GPS coordinates for a project - PASS
verified_features.GET /api/site-engineer/my-projects: Returns projects with latitude/longitude fields - PASS
verified_features.Marker Pins: 3 markers displayed for GPS projects - PASS
verified_features.Marker Popup: Shows project name, location, client name, coordinates - PASS
verified_features.GPS Badge on Cards: Green 'GPS' badge appears next to location - PASS
verified_features.Projects without GPS: No errors, gracefully skipped on map - PASS
verified_features.Map conditional rendering: Map only shows when >=1 project has GPS - PASS

frontend_test_results.Marker popup content: PASS - Shows name, location, client, coordinates
frontend_test_results.GPS count text: PASS - '3 of 5 projects with GPS coordinates'
